description_long: This is a robust, urban-style axe featuring a thick, segmented handle constructed from a combination of wood and metal, reinforced with multiple black metal bands. The handle is slightly curved and ergonomically shaped, with a prominent grip section near the base for secure handling. The axe head is large and angular, made of dark, heavy metal with a distinctive cutout design and a broad, single-edged blade. The blade is attached to the handle with a reinforced metal collar, and the poll is squared off, adding to the tool's utilitarian appearance. The overall finish is rugged and industrial, with visible bolts and fasteners, suggesting durability and heavy-duty use. The color palette is dominated by dark metallic grays, black, and natural wood tones, giving it a modern, tactical look suitable for urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty urban axe with a segmented, reinforced wooden and metal handle and a large, angular metal blade featuring cutouts and a rugged industrial finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight-on profile of the handle and the top of the axe head, with minimal blade visibility.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full blade shape, cutout design, and the ergonomic curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the poll of the axe head, with the blade edge mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view displaying the blade's cutout and the handle's grip features, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Segmented, slightly curved handle made of wood and metal, reinforced with black metal bands and a textured grip section; oval cross-section with ergonomic shaping.
attribute_blade_design: Large, single-edged steel blade with angular geometry, prominent cutouts, and a squared poll; industrial and tactical in appearance.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern reinforced mounting with a metal collar and visible bolts securing the blade to the handle.
